title:
"Plug-and-Play" Wi-Fi
*Is a Myth*
subtitle: You don't plug it in. You engineer it — or you reopen the same ticket forever.

left.title: The demo
items: Works perfectly — in an empty room.

right.title: Monday morning
items: The work was never the AP.

sections.title: What *"slow Wi-Fi"* tickets really are
items: Co-channel interference — APs fighting each other
Sticky clients clinging to a -80 dBm signal

sections.title: The part the box doesn't do

rows.label: of roaming decisions are the client's, not yours

footer:
Wired networks fail loudly.
Wireless networks fail *politely* — never on your dashboard.
